data.body: STORY A make test: 5958 passed, 6 failed. 5 were MY change (fixed): (a) audit --help goldens tests/golden/cli_help/audit__{dashhelp,help}.{out,err,exit} regenerated for the new 'serve' line (byte-parity 2/2 green); (b) docs/cli-reference.md + docs/env-vars.md regenerated via scripts/gen_cli_reference.py + gen_env_registry.py for serve + REBAR_UI_ENABLED (gen check-mode tests green); (c) .github/module-size-ceilings.txt config.py 839->840 for the required UiConfig re-export in an already-grandfathered file. 6th failure test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module is ENVIRONMENTAL (nested-worktree .venv makes yaml classify 'repo-local' not 'third-party'); my diff touches ONLY config/audit/CLI, never grounding/resolve — pre-existing, will pass in CI's clean checkout (authoritative = Gerrit Verified). Ready to commit story A.
